test.notes: All tests pass. 118 passed, 6 ignored, 0 failures across all crates including doc-tests.

typecheck.notes: Clippy fails with 9 errors identical to rounds 1 and 2: (1) unused variable `policy_ranges` in crates/wasm-runtime-interface/src/network.rs:317, (2) dead_code: SdkResponse, SdkResponseToolCall, SdkResponseFunctionCall, SdkUsage structs never constructed in crates/wasm-runtime-interface/src/llm.rs:605-627, (3) function parse_openai_response never used in llm.rs:687, (4) methods resolve_and_validate_ip and validate_ip_against_policy never used in network.rs:505-536, (5) type_complexity in crates/wasm-runtime-interface/src/storage.rs:308, (6) doc_lazy_continuation in vendor/bittensor-rs/src/subtensor.rs:328. Zero progress on these since round 1.

lint.notes: Formatting differences in 7 files unchanged since round 1: bins/platform-sudo/src/main.rs, bins/validator-node/src/main.rs, scripts/test-command-execution/src/main.rs, scripts/validate-test-commands/src/main.rs, scripts/validate-workspace-yaml/src/main.rs, tests/error_cases.rs, vendor/bittensor-rs/src/crv4/drand.rs.

reviewsSummary.skippedReason: Validators failed for the third consecutive round (clippy and fmt). Feature review skipped per scrutiny procedure — validators must pass before feature review can proceed.

blockingIssues.description: cargo clippy -- -D warnings fails with exit code 101. Identical 9 errors persist across all 3 rounds: dead_code (4 structs + 1 fn + 2 methods in wasm-runtime-interface), unused variable policy_ranges in network.rs, type_complexity in storage.rs, doc_lazy_continuation in vendor/bittensor-rs. The fix-cargo-clippy-warnings feature in code-improvements milestone is still 'pending'.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: The fix-cargo-clippy-warnings feature (code-improvements milestone) must be completed. The fixes are mechanical: (a) prefix policy_ranges with underscore, (b) add #[allow(dead_code)] to SdkResponse/SdkResponseToolCall/SdkResponseFunctionCall/SdkUsage/parse_openai_response/resolve_and_validate_ip/validate_ip_against_policy or remove them, (c) add type alias for complex return type in storage.rs, (d) indent doc continuation in subtensor.rs.

blockingIssues.description: cargo fmt -- --check fails with exit code 1 on 7 files. Same files as rounds 1 and 2. The fix-cargo-fmt-formatting feature in code-improvements milestone is still 'pending'.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Run `cargo fmt` — this is a single-command fix. The fix-cargo-fmt-formatting feature (code-improvements milestone) must be completed.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add mandatory pre-commit validation: all Rust workers MUST run `cargo fmt` and `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` before marking a feature complete. This is a hard gate.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Three consecutive scrutiny rounds failed due to unfixed fmt and clippy issues. Dataset-validation features were marked complete despite these violations. The fix features exist but are in a different milestone (code-improvements) that hasn't been prioritized.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The code-improvements milestone (specifically fix-cargo-fmt-formatting and fix-cargo-clippy-warnings) should be a prerequisite for dataset-validation scrutiny, or these fixes should be pulled into the dataset-validation milestone. The current milestone ordering creates a deadlock where scrutiny cannot pass.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Rounds 1, 2, and 3 of dataset-validation scrutiny all fail identically because the fixes belong to a different milestone. No progress is possible without resolving this cross-milestone dependency.
